on the website, and then I switched to head of product like a year and a bit, and that was interesting, helping run all the products, helped like figure out the roadmap, organize the company, was a pretty decent sized company already, 10 million users and all that, but, and then Basecamp guys started to spin off a bunch of companies, and they wanted to just focus on the project management tool of their core product, that was the thing that made a ton of money compared to everything else, like they always had like, all the products made like a few million dollars, and they had like a year, and they had like a little, little stuff on the side that are like 200, 300k a year, and they're like growing, and they were spinning off everything, and they just wanted to focus on the big one, the big one that was making like, seven, eight figure a year, and they, so they decided to spin off a company called Know Your Company, and my, a friend of mine, when the world was in Chicago, she was, ended up, you're not,en

have one for image generation that works really well.
